features.name: Harness bootstrap
features.description: Shared agent instructions, CI checks, architecture boundaries, and minimal booking slice are in place.
features.evidence: README, AGENTS.md, docs/system, scripts/check-*, and completed plan 2026-04-25-minimal-booking-slice.

features.name: Harness continuity
features.description: Claude Code memory, project subagents, session state, and initialization entrypoint make long-running work restartable.
features.evidence: ./init.sh, pnpm lint, pnpm typecheck, pnpm test, pnpm test:e2e, targeted Prettier check, and docs/plans/completed/2026-05-05-harness-continuity.md

features.name: Open Design UI/UX harness
features.description: Open Design is wired into Kimono One as an external design lab with active-plan fields, a system rule, and a harness check for UI/UX delivery.
features.evidence: docs/system/uiux-harness.md, docs/plans/template.md, scripts/check-uiux-harness.ts, pnpm check:uiux-harness, and pnpm check:harness.

features.name: Plans Open Design redesign
features.description: Use Open Design artifacts to improve the /plans browsing UI, then translate the selected direction into Kimono One tokens and Playwright evidence.
features.evidence: docs/plans/completed/2026-05-06-plans-open-design-redesign.md, docs/design/open-design/plans/brief.md, selected desktop/mobile screenshots, pnpm lint, pnpm typecheck, pnpm test, pnpm check:uiux-harness, pnpm check:harness, and pnpm test:e2e.
